phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Palácio de Belmarço?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW puh-LAHS-yoo DIH behl-MAH-ruh-soo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou na bilheteira do museu.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the local guide or at the museum ticket booth.

responses.english: Ask the local guide or at the museum ticket booth.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO moo-ZEHOO.
responses.local: Pergunte ao guia local ou na bilheteira do museu.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Palácio de Belmarço
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Palácio de Belmarço?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic mansion near the main arch, often hosting cultural exhibitions.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is next to the Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Good morning, it is next to the Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica junto ao Arco da Vila.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Palácio de Belmarço?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW puh-LAHS-yoo DIH behl-MAH-ruh-soo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte na bilheteira da Sé de Faro.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH SEH DIH FAH-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the ticket booth of Faro Cathedral.

responses.english: Ask at the ticket booth of Faro Cathedral.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH SEH DIH FAH-roo.
responses.local: Pergunte na bilheteira da Sé de Faro.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a entrada da Capela dos Ossos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh?

likely_response.local: A Capela dos Ossos fica na Igreja do Carmo. Pergunte a um guia local para a entrada exata.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh FEE-kuh NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO KAH-ruh-moo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL PUH-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh eh-ZAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Bone Chapel is in the Carmo Church. Ask a local guide for the exact entrance.

responses.english: The Bone Chapel is in the Carmo Church. Ask a local guide for the exact entrance.
responses.phonetic: AH kuh-PEH-luh DOOSH AW-soosh FEE-kuh NUH eeg-REH-zhuh DOO KAH-ruh-moo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG GEEUH loo-KAHL PUH-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh eh-ZAH-tuh.
responses.local: A Capela dos Ossos fica na Igreja do Carmo. Pergunte a um guia local para a entrada exata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua de Santo António starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa a Rua de Santo António?
phrases.cultural_note: Pedestrian street renowned for traditional souvenir stalls and artisan workshops.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, inicia-se junto à Praça do Município.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ee-nee-SEEUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh DOO moo-nee-SEEP-yoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it starts next to Praça do Município.

responses.english: Good morning, it starts next to Praça do Município.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ee-nee-SEEUH-SIH ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh DOO moo-nee-SEEP-yoo.
responses.local: Bom dia, inicia-se junto à Praça do Município.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o Palácio de Belmarço?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW puh-LAHS-yoo DIH behl-MAH-ruh-soo?

likely_response.local: O Palácio de Belmarço situa-se no centro histórico. Pergunte ao guia local ou na bilheteira da catedral para direções exatas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW puh-LAHS-yoo DIH behl-MAH-ruh-soo see-TOOUH-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL PUH-ruh dee-rih-SOHNYSH eh-ZAH-tuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where can I find Palácio de Belmarço? The Palácio de Belmarço is located in the historic center. Ask the local guide or at the cathedral ticket booth for exact directions.

responses.english: Where can I find Palácio de Belmarço? The Palácio de Belmarço is located in the historic center. Ask the local guide or at the cathedral ticket booth for exact directions.
responses.phonetic: AW puh-LAHS-yoo DIH behl-MAH-ruh-soo see-TOOUH-SIH NOO SAYNGT-roo eesh-TAW-ree-koo. peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH loo-KAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL PUH-ruh dee-rih-SOHNYSH eh-ZAH-tuhsh.
responses.local: O Palácio de Belmarço situa-se no centro histórico. Pergunte ao guia local ou na bilheteira da catedral para direções exatas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Praça do Município
phrases.text_local: Como chegar à Praça do Município?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH PRAH-suh DOO moo-nee-SEEP-yoo?
phrases.cultural_note: Historic civic square featuring elegant cafés and municipal buildings.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, atravesse o Arco da Vila.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uht-ruh-VEH-sih AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, pass through the Arco da Vila.

responses.english: Good morning, pass through the Arco da Vila.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uht-ruh-VEH-sih AW AH-ruh-koo DUH VEE-luh.
responses.local: Bom dia, atravesse o Arco da Vila.
